title: The Fall of the Louse of Usher: A Gothic Tale for the 21st Century
original_title: The Fall of the Louse of Usher
overview: Rock star Roddy Usher is confined to an insane asylum after murdering his wife. There, he is given various shock treatments by Nurse Smith and Dr Calahari, resulting in a series of bizarre and nightmarish adventures.
